🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇶🇦 US Iran negotiations appear to be moving back towards implementation of the memorandum of understanding.

• Qatari negotiators are in Iran meeting Iranian officials to help de escalate tensions and keep broader negotiations on track, in coordination with the US

• Talks are focused on implementing the US Iran memorandum of understanding and resolving disputes that led to the recent escalation, including navigation through the Strait of Hormuz

SPR came down from 325.7M barrels the week before to 319.5M barrels in the EIA report for week ending July 3, 2026.

Another 6M barrels gone. 
SPR is still being drawn while the Middle East conflict shows no sign of ending.

#OOTT #SPR #Geopolitics https://t.co/WaXyZbqEdx
quoted_text:
The SPR is being consumed as a short-term political and global market stabilizer during a period of active Middle East supply friction, at the cost of long-term readiness and potential cavern integrity. 

With the buffer at 1983 low, the margin for error on further disruptions shrinks dramatically. 

The period from late 2026 into 2027 will reveal how much “bought time” was actually worth the lost resilience, especially once product shortages and food price transmission become unavoidable.

The
